---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[Feature]: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Why is the current behavior insufficient?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you have thought about.

## Scope

Which package / app does this affect (`ffmpeg-video-composer`, `@leclap/web`, `@leclap/expo`, server)?

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or examples.
